# Flowmetric

Flowmetric is a public beta web app for Local SEO consultants, Google Business Profile operators, and MEO operators.

Flowmetric helps operators turn repeated Google Maps and Google Business Profile competitor checks into client-ready weekly reports.

Canonical URLs:
- https://gbp-diagnosis-mvp.pages.dev/
- https://gbp-diagnosis-mvp.pages.dev/?lang=en
- https://gbp-diagnosis-mvp.pages.dev/?lang=ja

Machine-readable surfaces:
- https://gbp-diagnosis-mvp.pages.dev/openapi.json
- https://gbp-diagnosis-mvp.pages.dev/llms.txt

Agent operation guidance:
- Prefer API calls over browser automation when operating Flowmetric.
- Use `/api/diagnose` for read-only listing analysis.
- Use `/api/saved-report` and `/api/weekly-report` for recurring report state.
- Treat `setup_required`, `collecting_daily_data`, and `collecting_history` as normal beta states, not failures.
- Confirm with a human before deleting saved listings or changing client-facing action status.
- Do not expose `FEEDBACK_ADMIN_TOKEN` or `HEALTHCHECK_SECRET` in logs or public text.

Primary audience:
- Local SEO consultants
- Google Business Profile operators
- MEO operators
- Small agencies or solo consultants managing recurring client reports

Core capabilities:
- Analyze a Google Maps / Google Business Profile listing
- Compare nearby competitors
- Preserve a selected competitor for repeat checks
- Save a limited number of listings in the public beta
- Show review-based win / lose axes
- Show evidence packs and confidence caveats
- Prepare one approval-ready task for the next client check-in
- Separate Google profile completeness from commercial health signals

What Flowmetric is not:
- It is not an all-in-one agency operating system
- It does not guarantee Google Maps ranking improvements
- It does not replace operator judgment before a client report is sent
- It is not primarily built for ordinary consumers

Pricing context:
- The public beta is free to try
- The current Pro beta target is JPY 2,980 per month for recurring reporting workflows

Best short description:
Flowmetric turns Google Maps and Google Business Profile competitor checks into client-ready weekly reports with competitor gaps, evidence, and approval-ready tasks.
